title: Shipping since 2020 has been shaped by events more than we have been used to
section_path: Shipping since 2020 has been shaped by events more than we have been used to
section_path_text: Shipping since 2020 has been shaped by events more than we have been used to
summary:
Main
So called 'fundamentals' gave way to outside factors which have reshaped them in the process. By Michalis Voutsinas
Shipping since 2020 has been shaped by events more than we have been used to . The Dry bulk market is no exception with Covid-19 , the Russian invasion of Ukraine and the Middle East conflict major waypoints on how the environment unfolded.
